member.name: M:GTA.Game.WasButtonCombinationJustEntered(GTA.Button[])
member.summary:
Gets whether a specific sequence of
s has been pressed.
member.param:
The sequence of
s in the order the user should enter them in-game.
member.returns: if the combination was just entered; otherwise,
member.remarks:
There must be between 6 and 29 inclusive
s otherwise an
is thrown. It only works for GamePad inputs. The in-game cheat combinations use the same system.
